Nejma Nefertiti · Art Direction Spec · Concept
Sakina

A universal call to prayer

A doorway to a sacred space. Step inside a mosque, and pray, wherever you are.

Concept & art direction
Interactive 3D space
Brand & copy
scroll

For fourteen centuries, the call to prayer has crossed deserts, cities, and oceans to reach whoever was listening.

Now it reaches you, wherever you are.

Not everyone can travel to a mosque. Distance, illness, a long shift, a country far from home. But the longing to stand inside that space, to feel its stillness, is possible.

Sakina
the stillness that descends in prayer

You lower the headset, and a doorway opens. Step through, and the room around you becomes a mosque, vast and luminous and still. The sacred comes to you.

The prayer hall

Step inside.

A real sacred space, built to be entered. Drag to look around.

Live · drag to look around
The world of Sakina

Grand, luminous, alive with light

◈ The dome Looking up into the great dome at dawn, the sunburst medallion catching first light, turquoise and gold geometry receding into the apex.
◈ The arches The colonnade of pointed arches, light falling through in long geometric shafts across the prayer hall.
◈ A single worshipper One figure in prayer in the vast space, small beneath the dome. The scale of the sacred, the intimacy of the moment.
◈ The doorway of light The threshold itself, a portal of light opening from an ordinary room into the mosque beyond.
◈ The mihrab The qibla niche, gold and cobalt, the point the whole space turns toward. The direction of prayer, found anywhere.

Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love.

- Rumi

In the world

How the campaign comes to life

Launch film
One call, many places
The adhan carries across the world in a single moment, a dozen lives in a dozen places, each lowering the headset and arriving in the same mosque, together.
The space
One sacred hall
A single prayer hall, rendered with reverence and built to be moved through. The first of a library to come.
Out of home
A doorway, anywhere
Wherever the call finds you, the threshold opens. The mosque is no longer a place you travel to, but one that arrives wherever you stand.
Sakina
A universal call to prayer
Spec campaign · concept, art direction & interactive build by Nejma Nefertiti
